items.question: What is the fundamental operation Claude performs when generating a reply?
options: SQL lookup in Anthropic's customer database
Next-token prediction from a trained neural network
Deterministic execution of hand-written if-else rules
Real-time web crawl of every question
items.answer: Next-token prediction from a trained neural network
items.explanation: LLMs score likely continuations and decode text token by token; they are not rule engines or guaranteed retrieval systems.

items.question: Why might a very long pasted document still cause incomplete answers?
options: Claude refuses all documents over one page
Context window limits and attention over very long inputs
Documents are automatically deleted for privacy
items.answer: Context window limits and attention over very long inputs
items.explanation: All material must fit in the context window; extremely long inputs may need chunking or multi-step workflows.

items.question: Which statement about tokens is correct?
options: Tokens are always single English words
Text is split into subword tokens that may be shorter than words
Tokens exist only on the API, not in chat
One token always equals one character
items.answer: Text is split into subword tokens that may be shorter than words
items.explanation: Tokenization splits text into pieces the model vocabulary understands; counts drive limits and API usage.

items.question: Hallucination in this roadmap means:
options: A visual rendering bug in claude.ai
Plausible but false or unsupported generated content
When the model runs out of GPU memory
items.answer: Plausible but false or unsupported generated content
items.explanation: Hallucination is a generation failure mode, not a UI or policy error.
